content:
Implementing preview comments on the fleet-flow visualization: reading the current files and applying the structural and copy changes.
Implementing the preview comments: updating v2 and syncing the React export.
Implementing the preview comments: updating v2 and syncing the React export.
Writing the updated visualization with all preview-comment changes.
Writing the updated visualization with all preview-comment changes.
Syncing the React export and updating sidebar metadata.
Syncing the React export and updating sidebar metadata.
Applied all seven preview comments to `movesai-fleet-flow-viz-2.html` and synced the React export.

### Copy & metadata
- **Title:** From Fleet Mix to Tons of Emissions
- **Subtitle:** Plain-language lead about picking county/year and hovering for details
- **Badge meta:** `4 counties · 6 vehicle classes · 3 pollutants`
- **Panel label:** HPMS vehicle class (with HPMS codes 10–60)

### 6 HPMS vehicle classes in the scene
Motorcycles, Passenger cars, Light-duty trucks, Buses, Heavy-duty trucks, Combo trucks — all six show as stack bars, toggles, and fleet stats.

### Pollutant roads (not vehicle roads)
- **3 roads per county** — one per pollutant (CO₂, PM2.5, NOx), colored by pollutant
- **Mixed vehicles** on each road — all active classes travel every road, showing that every class contributes to every pollutant
- Hover on a road now reads **Emission flow** with pollutant + tons

### Combined county + stats panel
- **Left:** compact county list (no CNT-A codes)
- **Right:** **6 stacked fleet counts** — one row per HPMS class for the selected county

### Stage labels
Moved down to sit over the 3D scene (`bottom: ~38%`), aligned left/center/right with fleet hexes, roads, and emission towers.

### Mobile
County/stats stack vertically on narrow screens; HPMS toggles scroll if needed.

Refresh `movesai-fleet-flow-viz-2.html` — you should see six stack bars, three pollutant-colored roads with mixed vehicles, tighter controls, and labels anchored to the scene.Applied all seven preview comments to `movesai-fleet-flow-viz-2.html` and synced the React export.

Refresh `movesai-fleet-flow-viz-2.html` — you should see six stack bars, three pollutant-colored roads with mixed vehicles, tighter controls, and labels anchored to the scene.
